user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 14:56 EST
Subject: Re: Re: QBR preparation Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about QBR preparation. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-02-22 14:02 EST
Subject: Re: QBR preparation Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with QBR preparation. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: QBR preparation Discussion - Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery
Date: 2024-01-19
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:01:30] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into QBR preparation.

[00:07:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:10:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:18:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:21:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

content.title: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery - QBR preparation

Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data

Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence
